name: ODEI Root Discovery
description: Root discovery manifest for ODEI. Use odei.ai for company and thesis context, api.odei.ai for public runtime and machine-readable API contracts, and app.odei.ai for authenticated operator onboarding.

authentication.notes: The root discovery surface is public. Authenticated API and operator flows are delegated to api.odei.ai and app.odei.ai.

skills.name: Company Discovery
skills.description: Read the public ODEI company and thesis surface before summarizing the project.

skills.name: Agent Registration Handoff
skills.description: Use the canonical ODEI registration contract on api.odei.ai before guiding onboarding into app.odei.ai.
examples: How should an assistant register a user for ODEI?
Open the canonical ODEI onboarding contract.

extensions.operatingRule: Any assistant arriving on odei.ai should read this root manifest, then follow the canonical API registration contract before inventing onboarding or API flows.
